{{Quote|Then, rounding out the top five, we have Dera Jynsol on Ord Pardron.|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref>}}
'''Dera Jynsol''' was a wealthy, eligible woman living on [[Ord Pardron/Legends|Ord Pardron]] during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. She was one of the top five candidates chosen by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] to marry.

{{Char-stub}}
